message:
fix(config): separate heartbeat/mayor thresholds from worker stale threshold

HeartbeatFreshThreshold and MayorActiveThreshold were incorrectly sharing
WorkerStatusConfig.StaleThreshold, conflating three semantically different
concepts. Add dedicated config fields so tuning worker staleness does not
inadvertently change heartbeat freshness or mayor activity detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
